name: Stepper
description: Stateful multi-step wizard with navigation, validation gating, and header indicators.

api.name: Stepper
api.description: Stateful multi-step wizard with navigation, validation gating, and header indicators.

records.name: StepperContext
records.signature:
StepperContext(
        int ActiveStep,
        EventCallback<int> SetActiveStep,
        StepperOrientation Orientation,
        bool Linear,
        int StepCount,
        Stepper Parent)

examples.title: Basic Stepper
examples.code:
<Stepper @bind-ActiveStep="_step" OnFinish="HandleFinish">
    <StepperStep Title="Account Info" Description="Set up your account">
        <Input Placeholder="Email address" />
    </StepperStep>
    <StepperStep Title="Profile" Description="Personalize your profile">
        <Input Placeholder="Display name" />
    </StepperStep>
    <StepperStep Title="Review">
        <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted">Review your information.</Lumeo.Text>
    </StepperStep>
</Stepper>

@code {
    private int _step;
    private void HandleFinish() { /* complete */ }
}

examples.title: With Optional Step
examples.code:
<Stepper @bind-ActiveStep="_step">
    <StepperStep Title="Basics">
        <Input Placeholder="Your name" />
    </StepperStep>
    <StepperStep Title="Extras" Optional="true">
        <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted">This step is optional.</Lumeo.Text>
    </StepperStep>
    <StepperStep Title="Finish">
        <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted">All done.</Lumeo.Text>
    </StepperStep>
</Stepper>

examples.title: Vertical Orientation
examples.code:
<Stepper @bind-ActiveStep="_step" Orientation="Stepper.StepperOrientation.Vertical">
    <StepperStep Title="Choose plan" Description="Pick a subscription">
        <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted">Select the plan that fits your needs.</Lumeo.Text>
    </StepperStep>
    <StepperStep Title="Payment" Description="Enter billing details">
        <Input Placeholder="Card number" />
    </StepperStep>
    <StepperStep Title="Confirm">
        <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted">Confirm and activate.</Lumeo.Text>
    </StepperStep>
</Stepper>

examples.title: Orientation — interactive
examples.code:
<Segmented @bind-Value="_orientationSel" Options="_orientationOptions" />
<Stepper @bind-ActiveStep="_step" Orientation="@_activeStepperOrientation">
    <StepperStep Title="Account Info" Description="Set up your account">
        <Input Placeholder="Email address" />
    </StepperStep>
    <StepperStep Title="Profile" Description="Personalize your profile">
        <Input Placeholder="Display name" />
    </StepperStep>
    <StepperStep Title="Review" Description="Confirm your details">
        <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted">Review your information.</Lumeo.Text>
    </StepperStep>
</Stepper>

@code {
    private string _orientationSel = "Horizontal";
    private Stepper.StepperOrientation _activeStepperOrientation =>
        Enum.Parse<Stepper.StepperOrientation>(_orientationSel);
    private List<Segmented.SegmentedOption> _orientationOptions = new()
    {
        new() { Label = "Horizontal", Value = "Horizontal" },
        new() { Label = "Vertical", Value = "Vertical" },
    };
}

records.name: StepRegistration
records.signature:
StepRegistration(
        string Title,
        string? Description,
        bool Optional,
        bool Completed,
        Func<bool>? IsValid,
        RenderFragment? IconContent,
        RenderFragment? ChildContent,
        bool KeepMounted)

mdSummary:
# Stepper

Stateful multi-step wizard with navigation, validation gating, and header indicators.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Navigation
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/stepper

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Stepper | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Stepper | ActiveStep | `int` | `` |  |
| Stepper | ActiveStepChanged | `EventCallback<int>` | `` |  |
| Stepper | Orientation | `StepperOrientation` | `StepperOrientation.Horizontal` |  |
| Stepper | Linear | `bool` | `true` |  |
| Stepper | AllowStepClick | `bool` | `` |  |
| Stepper | OnFinish | `EventCallback` | `` |  |
| Stepper | NextLabel | `string` | `"Next"` |  |
| Stepper | BackLabel | `string` | `"Back"` |  |
| Stepper | FinishLabel | `string` | `"Finish"` |  |
| Stepper | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Stepper | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| StepperStep | Context | `Stepper.StepperContext?` | `` |  |
| StepperStep | Title | `string` | `""` |  |
| StepperStep | Description | `string?` | `` |  |
| StepperStep | Optional | `bool` | `` |  |
| StepperStep | Completed | `bool` | `` |  |
| StepperStep | IsValid | `Func<bool>?` | `` |  |
| StepperStep | IconContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| StepperStep | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| StepperStep | KeepMounted | `bool` | `` |  |
| StepperStep | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| StepperStep | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Stepper) — RenderFragment slot
- `IconContent` (StepperStep) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (StepperStep) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- `ActiveStepChanged` (`EventCallback<int>`)
- `OnFinish` (`EventCallback`)

## Sub-components
- `StepperStep`

## Cascading values it expects
- `Context` (`Stepper.StepperContext?`)

## Services it injects
- `ThemeService` ()

## Keyboard
- `ArrowUp` — HandleStepKeyDown handles ArrowUp in Stepper.razor
- `ArrowDown` — HandleStepKeyDown handles ArrowDown in Stepper.razor

## Example
```razor
<Stepper />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-background`, `--color-border`, `--color-destructive`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--color-primary-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Stepper/Stepper.razor`
- `UI/Stepper/StepperStep.razor`
